response.overview: Steamy mornings have a way of bringing out the most passionate sides of us—and the one inside our latest augmented reality porn video is no exception. “Sleeping Hottie” brings one of those situations impossible to resist with the beautiful Emma Rosie AR pornstar. Slip on your headset and surrender—you’ll be right there, giving her exactly what she’s been craving all night long!  Inside this teen AR porn fantasy, after ending last night on a sweet note of cuddles, you wake to find her nestled against your chest, her soft breath warm on your skin. You’ve been a real gentleman, and it all feels sweet. However, it seems like neither of you cares about the day ahead—you only care about each other. Gratitude shines in her eyes, but it’s the spark of desire that takes over as her hands begin to wander.
response.title: Sleeping Hottie
